summary: Tested Chantier 4 — Programmes feature: backend API, programs page, program detail page, portfolio filter, viewer access. All tests passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chantier 4 fully validated. Programs page at /programmes shows 3 cards (Transformation Digitale & Métiers=orange, Modernisation SI & Infrastructure=red, Conformité RH & Sécurité=red). Program detail has projects table, TOTAUX PROGRAMME row, milestones section (9 jalons for first program). Portfolio has program filter with 3 options; filtering by program correctly reduces rows (e.g. 3 for Transformation Digitale). Project rows in portfolio show program name subtitle. Viewer (viewer@altair.fr/View1234!) can access programs page. Sidebar order: Tableau de bord > Programmes > Portefeuille confirmed.

test_results.sidebar_programmes_item: PASS - Programmes appears between Tableau de bord and Portefeuille
test_results.program_cards_names: PASS - Transformation Digitale & Métiers, Modernisation SI & Infrastructure, Conformité RH & Sécurité
test_results.program_cards_rag_badge: PASS - RAG badges visible (orange, red, red)
test_results.program_totals_row: PASS - TOTAUX PROGRAMME row with budget values
test_results.portfolio_filter_works: PASS - filtering by Transformation Digitale shows 3 projects
test_results.portfolio_program_subtitle: PASS - program name shown as subtitle under project name
test_results.viewer_programs_access: PASS - viewer can read programs page
